displacement_watch.notes: No acute displacement velocity changes detected due to lack of recent IDMC or UN OCHA data for the week.

weekly_brief_narrative: Search results from specified Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources yielded no substantive updates on the eight monitored theatres for the week ending 2026-04-18. This represents a structural coverage failure particularly for active theatres Sudan, Myanmar, and DRC, where fewer than three combined findings were obtained despite targeted searches of ACLED, UCDP, and UN OCHA. Russia-Ukraine maintains a stable trajectory with baseline I2 military posture amid ongoing kinetic exchanges, but no new troop movements or nuclear rhetoric beyond November 2024 doctrine shifts were confirmed. Gaza remains locked in high-intensity urban warfare with I6 displacement at critical levels, though no I5 diplomatic breakthroughs via Qatar/Egypt channels emerged. Sudan exhibits entrenched SAF/RSF stalemate with persistent I6 pressures per IDMC January 2026 reset, but no fresh I2 operations reported. Myanmar junta faces continued territorial fragmentation from ethnic resistances, yet Tier 1 data lags prevent trajectory assessment. DRC eastern conflict shows stable M23/FARDC dynamics with latent I4 mineral coercion risks tagging to GMM. Iran regional tensions hold at episodic levels without confirmed I2 posture changes. Watch theatres Haiti and Sahel show no entry triggers met. Displacement trends across active theatres remain elevated but without velocity accelerations or corridor shifts in available data. Monitor ACLED 2026 Watchlist priorities for Sudan fatality density and Myanmar ethnic offensives; track Russia-Ukraine for Trump-Witkoff I5 framework progress and drone swarm thresholds in I2 scoring. Thresholds to watch: ≥15% UNHCR displacement spikes, ICG 'Deteriorated' alerts, or cross-border drone incursions.
